title: Coconut Rice

html:
COCONUT RICE

Ingredients

  • 500 ml long-grain rice
  • 1 tin coconut milk
  • 375 ml water
  • 5 ml sugar
  • 10 ml salt
  • toasted desiccated coconut for garnishing

Method

  1. Put your rice, coconut milk, water, sugar and salt in a pot.
  2. Let it cook for 20 minutes until the rice is soft.
  3. Let it stand for 10 minutes and use a fork to fluff it up nicely

Serve with toasted coconut
